decision: Never cache auth token responses in any storage layer — in-memory dict, Redis, or otherwise. Password resets must immediately invalidate all active tokens.
reason: Sept 2025 outage: Redis cache served revoked tokens for 120 minutes after password reset. Users authenticated with invalid credentials.

decision: Auth service must use server-side sessions, not stateless JWTs, for all user-facing endpoints.
reason: JWT revocation requires a blocklist — without it, tokens stay valid after logout. Server-side sessions give instant invalidation.

decision: Never concatenate user input directly into SQL queries. Always use parameterized queries or the ORM.
reason: Security audit Q4 2025 flagged 3 endpoints with SQL injection risk.

decision: All async background jobs must go through the task queue (Celery). No fire-and-forget threads.
reason: Untracked threads caused silent failures in the email service — jobs died with no logs.
